category: Requesting Single Account for Logging into Lab Computer
modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request for shared login credentials for lab computer access

full_description_text:  
A new computer has been set up in the lab, and it will be used by several people. The team is wondering if it's possible to create a single username and password that everyone can use to log into this shared machine. This would make it easier for everyone to access the lab computer without needing individual accounts.
